{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=To strike the enemy from a long distance, Cosmic Tracker created this model of Snail Shell, stocking with multiple weapons that could assault targets from afar!
|affct=TECH
|hard=DEF
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=1926
|relic1=Solar Sail
|relic2=Rutherford Model
|relic3=AMS
|relic4=Black Body
|relic5=Goldbach Conjecture
}}
|color=purple
|earth=6
|water=8
|fire=7
|wind=5
|form=Mecha
|element=Water
|realm=Rift
|orangehard=HP
}}
